record.field: May contain traces of NUTS. REFRIGERATE AFTER OPENING. DO NOT FREEZE.

field.name: x_ingredient_ids
field.eval: [ (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_2'), 'x_share': 80.0}), (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_4'), 'x_share': 8.0}), (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_8'), 'x_share': 6.0}), (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_5'), 'x_share': 3.0}), (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_6'), 'x_share': 0.0}), (0, 0, {'x_ingredient_id': ref('product_template_7'), 'x_share': 0.0}), ]

field.name: x_nutritional_fact_ids
field.eval: [ (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_1'), 'x_per_100g': 727.0}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_6'), 'x_per_100g': 80.0}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_7'), 'x_per_100g': 6.7}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_3'), 'x_per_100g': 1.4}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_4'), 'x_per_100g': 1.3}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_2'), 'x_per_100g': 1.2}), (0, 0, {'x_nutritional_fact_id': ref('x_nutritional_facts_10'), 'x_per_100g': 1.5}), ]
